name: Apple-Coconut Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix sliced apples with sugar, flour, and salt until well combined.
3. Add coconut flakes and vanilla extract; stir gently.
4. Pour mixture into a pie dish lined with parchment paper.
5. Dot with margarine.
6. Bake for 45 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Turn off the oven heat and let cool before serving.
